HTML template for editing and deleting a blog post in a Flask application.

# Purpose
The template file defines the structure and layout for a blog post editing page in a web application. It extends a base template, `base.html`, and customizes specific blocks such as `header` and `content`. The `header` block displays the title of the post being edited, using the `post['title']` variable. The `content` block contains a form for editing the post's title and body, pre-filling the fields with existing data from the `post` object or the current form submission. Additionally, it includes a form to delete the post, which sends a POST request to the `blog.delete` route with the post's ID, and prompts the user for confirmation before deletion.
